todos.content: Read spec at project_board/specs/fused_attack_resources_spec.md (FAR-1 through FAR-7, FAR-EC-1 through FAR-EC-8)
Read existing test patterns: tests/scripts/attacks/test_attack_database.gd and test_fused_combo_matrix.gd
Read scripts/attacks/attack_database.gd for base attack constants (damage, cooldown values for FAR-7 comparisons)
Read tests/utils/test_utils.gd for available assertion helpers (_assert_approx, _assert_eq_float, etc.)
Write tests/scripts/attacks/test_fused_attack_resources.gd with 36 test functions covering FAR-1 through FAR-7
Verify FAR-EC-1 slow=0.0 falsy-zero pattern: used has() + typeof()==TYPE_FLOAT + ==0.0 (not truthiness)
Verify FAR-EC-8 float precision: used _assert_approx() for 0.8, 0.6, and 1.2 acid_dps values
Run timeout 300 godot --headless -s tests/run_tests.gd and confirm tests are RED (49 failures from missing fused registrations) and pre-existing tests are green
Update handoff-latest.yaml from Spec->Test Designer to Test Designer->Test Breaker
Update todos-latest.json for test design run
Advance ticket Stage to TEST_BREAK, Revision to 3, Last Updated By to Test Designer Agent
Add index entry to project_board/CHECKPOINTS.md for test design run outcome
